title: Garlic Chili Caramel
description: A garlicky, crunchy, sick-day Uruguayan dish featuring chili powder and caramelized flavors, perfect for a quick snack or meal.

ingredients.name: vinegar
ingredients.amount: a few drops (apple cider or white vinegar)

instructions: Heat a little vegetable oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and chili powder to the pan. Cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Gradually add sugar, stirring constantly to prevent burning. Continue cooking until the mixture turns amber and caramelizes, about 2-3 minutes.
Stir in vinegar (if using) to help pull off excess sugar from the bottom of the pan.
Remove from heat and serve immediately as a crunchy topping or dip for other dishes.
